positive: A geometric, stylized woodland scene featuring silhouetted deer, crescent moons, and sprawling abstract roots, set against a vibrant, gradient twilight sky of deep indigo, cosmic purple, and ethereal teal. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, emphasizing strong, clean outlines for print transfer. Use negative space effectively to create high contrast. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau combined with vaporwave aesthetics. Lighting: Soft, ambient glow from the background; sharp edges and defined shapes for the foreground subjects. Colors: Rich jewel tones contrasted with midnight blues. Suitable for screen printing on black or cream fabric.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, poorly rendered, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, cropped, out of focus, noise, gradient mess
